name: Titanium X Pro
description: The Titanium X Pro features a 6.7-inch Super Retina XDR display, advanced triple-camera system, and the lightning-fast A18 chip. Designed for durability with a ceramic shield front and aerospace-grade titanium edges.

name: Nova Lite 12
description: A sleek mid-range smartphone with a 6.4-inch AMOLED display, dual camera setup, and long-lasting 4200mAh battery. Perfect for everyday use with a clean UI.

name: ProBook Ultra 15
description: Ultra-thin 15-inch laptop with a stunning IPS display, Intel Core i7 processor, and 16GB RAM. Designed for professionals who demand power and portability.

name: GameForce X1
description: A powerhouse gaming laptop with RTX 4070 GPU, AMD Ryzen 9 processor, 165Hz display, and advanced thermal management. Dominate every game.

name: AirPods Nova Pro
description: Premium true wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation, spatial audio, and 30-hour total battery life. Crystal-clear calls and immersive sound.

name: PulseWatch Series 5
description: Advanced health tracking smartwatch with ECG monitoring, blood oxygen sensor, GPS, and a vivid always-on AMOLED display. Designed for both fitness and fashion.

name: TabMax Pro 11
description: An 11-inch tablet with a Liquid Retina display, M2 chip, and all-day battery life. Great for creative professionals, students, and entertainment.

name: BoomBox 360
description: Portable 360-degree surround sound speaker with 20 hours of battery life, IP67 waterproofing, and dual passive radiators for deep bass.

name: SnapShot Pro Z50
description: Mirrorless camera with a 24.2MP sensor, 4K video recording, in-body image stabilization, and fast autofocus. Perfect for professionals and enthusiasts.

name: VisionEdge 27 QHD
description: 27-inch QHD IPS monitor with 165Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, and HDR400 support. Built for gaming and creative work alike.

name: Heritage Leather Biker Jacket
description: Crafted from 100% genuine top-grain leather, this biker jacket offers a timeless silhouette with modern durability. Features quilted lining, heavy-duty YKK zippers, and four exterior pockets.

name: Oxford Slim Dress Shirt
description: A premium Oxford dress shirt with a slim fit cut, mother-of-pearl buttons, and wrinkle-resistant fabric. Versatile enough for office and formal occasions.

name: StrechFlex Chino Pants
description: Comfortable chino pants made with stretch-flex fabric for freedom of movement. Slim tapered fit with a clean finish suitable for both casual and semi-formal settings.

name: AeroStep Runner
description: Lightweight running sneakers engineered with AeroStep foam sole for superior cushioning and energy return. Breathable mesh upper for all-day comfort.

name: Cozy Fleece Hoodie
description: Premium fleece hoodie with a brushed interior for exceptional warmth. Kangaroo pocket, adjustable drawstring hood, and ribbed cuffs for a relaxed yet polished look.

name: Meridian Slim Suit
description: A sophisticated slim-cut suit made from premium Italian wool blend. Fully lined with notch lapels, double vents, and a modern 2-button single-breasted closure.

name: Rugged Selvedge Denim Jeans
description: Japanese selvedge denim with a classic straight fit, iconic red line stitching, and YKK hardware. Built to age beautifully with every wear.

name: Leather Bifold Wallet
description: Slim genuine leather bifold wallet with RFID blocking technology, 6 card slots, and a full-length bill compartment. Minimalist design with premium craftsmanship.

name: Structured 6-Panel Cap
description: A classic structured baseball cap with a curved brim, moisture-wicking sweatband, and adjustable snap-back closure. UV protection rating of 50+.

name: Silk Paisley Necktie
description: Luxurious 100% pure silk necktie with an intricate paisley pattern, hand-finished edges, and a classic 8cm blade width. A timeless addition to any formal wardrobe.

name: Floral Wrap Maxi Dress
description: Effortlessly feminine wrap maxi dress in a vibrant floral print. Made from lightweight viscose, it features a V-neckline, adjustable tie waist, and a flowing A-line skirt.

name: Ribbed Knit Crop Top
description: Soft ribbed-knit crop top with a fitted silhouette, round neckline, and short sleeves. Pairs perfectly with high-waist jeans, skirts, or co-ord sets.

name: High-Rise Flare Jeans
description: Retro-inspired high-rise flare jeans with a body-sculpting fit and wide leg opening. Made with a stretch-denim blend for all-day comfort.

name: Oversized Linen Blazer
description: Chic oversized linen blazer with a relaxed silhouette, notched lapels, and patch pockets. Effortlessly elevates casual looks for office or weekend wear.

name: Crescent Shoulder Bag
description: Elegant crescent-shaped shoulder bag crafted from genuine pebbled leather. Features an adjustable strap, gold-tone hardware, and a suede-lined interior with magnetic closure.

name: Block Heel Ankle Boots
description: Sleek ankle boots with a comfortable 5cm block heel, side zip closure, and cushioned insole. A versatile wardrobe staple for fall and winter.

name: Sunset One-Piece Swimsuit
description: Flattering one-piece swimsuit with a scoop back, adjustable straps, and UPF50+ sun protection. Made from recycled nylon for a sustainable choice.

name: Cashmere Blend Infinity Scarf
description: Ultra-soft cashmere-blend infinity scarf with a delicate ribbed texture. Lightweight yet warm, it wraps around twice for versatile styling.

name: Oversized Tortoise Sunglasses
description: Classic oversized square sunglasses with polarized UV400 lenses and a lightweight acetate frame. A timeless accessory for every season.

name: Chunky Cable Knit Sweater
description: Cozy oversized chunky cable knit sweater in a relaxed drop-shoulder silhouette. Crafted from a thick merino-blend yarn for warmth without bulk.

name: Artisan Greek Yogurt
description: Thick, creamy, and packed with probiotics. Our Greek yogurt is strained using traditional methods and made from hormone-free, grass-fed cow milk. Perfect for breakfast or healthy snacks.

name: Whole Grain Sourdough Loaf
description: Traditionally fermented sourdough loaf made with stone-ground whole grain flour. Rich flavor, chewy crust, and excellent shelf life without preservatives.

name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
description: Cold-pressed extra virgin olive oil from sun-ripened Kalamata olives in Greece. Rich in antioxidants with a fruity aroma and smooth finish.

name: Organic Rolled Oats
description: Certified organic whole grain rolled oats, perfect for porridge, granola, and baking. Naturally gluten-free, high in fiber and beta-glucan.

name: Cold Brew Coffee Concentrate
description: Small-batch cold brew concentrate steeped for 24 hours with specialty-grade Arabica beans. Smooth, low-acid flavor. Mix 1:1 with water or milk.

name: Mixed Raw Nut Pack
description: Premium mix of raw almonds, cashews, walnuts, and Brazil nuts. Unsalted, unroasted, and packed with healthy fats, protein, and minerals.

description: Pure Himalayan pink salt in a refillable ceramic grinder. Rich in trace minerals with a mild, clean flavor that enhances any dish.

name: Dark Chocolate Almond Bark
description: Rich 72% dark chocolate bark studded with whole roasted almonds and a sprinkle of sea salt. Made with ethically sourced cacao and no artificial flavors.

name: Semolina Linguine Pasta
description: Bronze-die cut semolina linguine with a rough texture that grips sauce perfectly. Made using a traditional Italian recipe with slow-drying methods.

name: Ceremonial Grade Matcha
description: Premium ceremonial grade matcha from shade-grown Uji tea leaves in Japan. Vivid green color, smooth umami flavor, and rich in L-theanine and antioxidants.

name: Advanced Omega-3 Fish Oil
description: Highly concentrated Omega-3 fatty acids sourced from wild-caught deep-sea fish. Supports heart health, brain function, and joint mobility with a burp-free, lemon-flavored coating.

name: Vitamin D3 + K2 Complex
description: Synergistic formula combining Vitamin D3 (5000 IU) with Vitamin K2 (MK-7 form) to support calcium absorption, bone density, and immune function.

name: Multi-Strain Probiotic 50 Billion
description: Advanced 50 billion CFU probiotic with 16 clinically studied strains including Lactobacillus and Bifidobacterium. Supports gut microbiome balance and digestive health.

name: Collagen Peptide Powder
description: Hydrolyzed bovine collagen peptides (Types I & III) for skin elasticity, joint support, and hair and nail strength. Unflavored, dissolves easily in hot or cold liquids.

name: Magnesium Glycinate 400mg
description: Highly bioavailable magnesium glycinate formula that supports sleep quality, muscle relaxation, and stress reduction without causing digestive discomfort.

name: Natural Throat Lozenges Honey & Lemon
description: Soothing throat lozenges made with real honey and lemon extract. Provides fast relief from throat irritation and minor soreness without artificial flavors.

description: Clinically validated wrist blood pressure monitor with irregular heartbeat detection, memory storage for 60 readings, and a large easy-to-read display.

name: Melatonin Sleep Gummies 5mg
description: Berry-flavored melatonin gummies formulated to help regulate sleep cycles and reduce the time to fall asleep. Vegan, gelatin-free, and made without artificial sweeteners.

name: Whey Protein Isolate Vanilla
description: Fast-absorbing whey protein isolate with 27g of protein per serving, minimal carbs, and zero added sugar. Ideal for post-workout muscle recovery.

name: Premium First Aid Kit 85pc
description: Comprehensive 85-piece first aid kit in a hard-shell carry case. Includes bandages, antiseptic wipes, gauze pads, medical tape, tweezers, and emergency guide.

name: ModLoft Sectional Sofa
description: Modern L-shaped sectional sofa with chaise lounge, removable cushions, and solid hardwood frame. Upholstered in stain-resistant performance fabric.

name: Egyptian Cotton Duvet Cover Set
description: Luxuriously soft 400 thread count Egyptian cotton duvet cover set including 2 pillowcases. Breathable, hypoallergenic, and machine washable.

name: Cast Iron Dutch Oven 5.5QT
description: Enameled cast iron Dutch oven for braising, soups, stews, and bread baking. Even heat distribution, oven-safe to 500°F, and dishwasher-safe lid.

name: Geometric Terracotta Planter Set
description: Set of 3 handcrafted geometric terracotta planters in graduated sizes. Each features a drainage hole and matching saucers. Perfect for indoor succulents and herbs.

name: Nordic Pendant Lamp
description: Minimalist Nordic-style pendant lamp with an adjustable cord and geometric shade. Works with standard E27 bulb (not included). Perfect for dining and living spaces.

name: All-Surface Concentrate Cleaner
description: Plant-based multi-surface concentrate that dilutes into 30 bottles of effective cleaner. Non-toxic, biodegradable, and free from synthetic fragrances.

name: Chunky Woven Throw Blanket
description: Hand-loomed chunky woven throw made from recycled cotton. Generously sized at 130x170cm, it adds warmth and texture to any sofa or bed.

name: Bamboo Drawer Organizer Set
description: Set of 5 interlocking bamboo drawer organizers in varying sizes. Sustainably sourced, lightweight, and ideal for kitchen utensils, office supplies, or vanity items.

name: Lavender & Eucalyptus Soy Candle
description: Hand-poured 100% natural soy wax candle with calming lavender and eucalyptus essential oils. Cotton wick, 50+ hour burn time, and housed in a reusable glass jar.

name: Vintage Boho Wool Rug 5x8
description: Hand-knotted wool area rug in a vintage Moroccan-inspired geometric pattern. Thick pile for added cushioning, suitable for low-traffic indoor spaces.

name: TrailBlazer Pro Running Shoes
description: High-performance trail running shoes with a carbon-infused foam midsole, aggressive multi-directional lugs, and a waterproof upper. Built for both speed and durability.

name: Natural Rubber Yoga Mat 6mm
description: Eco-friendly natural rubber yoga mat with 6mm cushioning, superior grip in both dry and wet conditions, and alignment lines for proper positioning.

name: Aero Carbon Road Bike Helmet
description: Lightweight aerodynamic road bike helmet with MIPS protection, 22 vents for airflow, and an adjustable retention system. Certified to CPSC and CE EN1078.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set 5-52.5 lbs
description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbell set that replaces 15 pairs of weights. Dial-select mechanism adjusts from 5 to 52.5 lbs in 2.5 lb increments.

name: Elite Performance Swim Goggles
description: Hydrodynamic swim goggles with UV400-protected polycarbonate lenses, silicone gaskets for a leak-proof seal, and dual adjustable straps.

description: High-modulus graphite tennis racket with an open 16x19 string pattern for maximum spin potential. Lightweight at 295g strung, ideal for intermediate to advanced players.

name: Urban Cruiser Skateboard
description: Complete 8-inch Canadian maple skateboard with ABEC-7 bearings, 52mm wheels, and 5.25-inch aluminum trucks. Ready to ride out of the box.

name: Match Pro Football
description: FIFA Quality Pro certified match football with thermally bonded panels, butyl bladder for superior air retention, and a consistent flight trajectory.

name: Yoga Resistance Band Set
description: Set of 5 latex resistance bands in light to extra-heavy resistance levels. Ideal for stretching, strength training, yoga, and physical therapy.

name: Jump Rope Speed Cable
description: Ultra-fast speed jump rope with a 3mm steel cable coated in PVC, 360-degree ball-bearing handles, and fully adjustable length for all heights.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
description: 15% L-Ascorbic Acid serum with hyaluronic acid and vitamin E for brightening, anti-aging, and hydration. Clinically tested for all skin types, fragrance-free.

name: Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1% Pore Serum
description: High-strength niacinamide serum for reducing pore appearance, controlling sebum production, and improving skin texture. Lightweight, water-based formula.

name: Bond Repair Strengthening Shampoo
description: Bond-repair technology shampoo that rebuilds damaged hair from the inside out. Sulfate-free, enriched with keratin protein and argan oil for frizz control and shine.

specifications.key_ingredients: Keratin, Argan Oil, Bond Repair Complex

name: Deep Hydrating Hair Mask
description: Intensive moisture treatment with shea butter, avocado oil, and panthenol. Restores elasticity and shine to dry, brittle, or chemically treated hair in 3 minutes.

name: Full Coverage Matte Foundation
description: Long-wearing full coverage matte foundation with SPF30, 24-hour oil control, and a skin-like natural finish. Available in 30 inclusive shades.

name: Precision Liquid Eyeliner
description: Ultra-black waterproof liquid eyeliner with a 0.1mm micro-brush tip for sharp, defined lines. Smudge-proof, fade-proof, and lasts up to 24 hours.

name: Press-On Gel Nail Kit
description: Salon-quality press-on nails with a gel-like finish. Includes 24 nails in 12 sizes, nail glue, and a prep kit. Easy application and removal, lasts up to 14 days.

name: Midnight Orchid Eau de Parfum
description: Intoxicating oriental floral Eau de Parfum with notes of black orchid, sandalwood, and dark musk. Long-lasting projection and excellent sillage.

name: Eucalyptus Mint Body Scrub
description: Energizing body scrub with sugar crystals, eucalyptus essential oil, and peppermint extract. Exfoliates dead skin cells and leaves skin soft, smooth, and refreshed.

description: Lightweight, invisible broad-spectrum sunscreen with SPF50+ and PA++++. No white cast, water-resistant, and suitable for all skin tones. Reef-safe formula.

name: Retinol 0.5% Night Cream
description: Encapsulated 0.5% retinol night cream with hyaluronic acid and ceramides. Minimizes fine lines, improves skin texture, and supports cell turnover with minimal irritation.

description: High-shine plumping lip gloss set with hyaluronic acid and vitamin E. Non-sticky formula that delivers instant volume and moisture.

description: Professional 2200W ionic hair dryer with AC motor for faster drying, 3 heat and 2 speed settings, cold shot button, and 2 concentrator nozzles.

name: Hyaluronic Acid Hydration Toner
description: Triple-weight hyaluronic acid toner that delivers instant and sustained hydration. Boosts skin's moisture barrier, preps skin for serums and moisturizers.

name: Lash Extension Mascara
description: Buildable, volumizing mascara with a fiber-infused formula for length, volume, and a lash-extension effect. Waterproof and ophthalmologist-tested.

description: Clinically proven peptide eye cream that visibly reduces dark circles, puffiness, and crow's feet. Cooling metal applicator for lymphatic drainage.

description: Authentic 100% rose quartz gua sha tool and double-headed jade roller set. Reduces facial puffiness, promotes lymphatic drainage, and improves product absorption.

name: Long Wear Liquid Lipstick
description: Transfer-proof matte liquid lipstick that sets in 60 seconds and lasts up to 16 hours. Lightweight formula that doesn't dry out lips.

name: Activated Charcoal Whitening Toothpaste
description: Natural activated charcoal whitening toothpaste with coconut oil and peppermint. Gently removes surface stains, freshens breath, and is fluoride-free.

name: ZenPhone Air
description: Featherlight smartphone under 160g featuring a 6.1-inch FHD+ display, dual rear cameras, and an ultra-efficient processor for all-day battery life.

name: CleanBot AI Robot Vacuum
description: Smart robot vacuum with LiDAR navigation, object avoidance AI, auto-empty base, and multi-floor mapping. Works with Alexa and Google Assistant.

description: Industry-leading noise cancelling headphones with 30-hour battery life, multipoint pairing, foldable design, and premium 40mm drivers for hi-fi audio.

name: Air Fryer XL 6.5QT
description: Extra-large 6.5QT air fryer with rapid air circulation technology. 8 pre-set cooking modes, digital touchscreen, and dishwasher-safe basket. Reduces fat by up to 75%.

name: Pour-Over Coffee Maker Set
description: Elegant borosilicate glass pour-over coffee maker set with a gooseneck kettle, thermometer, and filters. Perfect for precision manual brewing.

name: Bamboo Bath Towel Set
description: Luxuriously absorbent 600 GSM bamboo cotton blend bath towel set (2 bath towels, 2 hand towels, 2 face cloths). Quick-drying, hypoallergenic, and OEKO-TEX certified.

name: Monstera Deliciosa Plant
description: Healthy, well-rooted Monstera Deliciosa plant (40-50cm tall) in a 15cm nursery pot. A low-maintenance statement plant for any bright indoor space.

description: Set of 3 botanical illustration canvas prints with gold foil accents. Gallery-wrapped on 3cm depth stretcher bars, ready to hang. A contemporary nature-inspired decor collection.

name: Pro Grip Basketball Size 7

name: Heavy Duty Punching Bag 100lbs

description: 4-pack of 100g unsweetened acai berry frozen puree. Sourced directly from Amazon rainforest. Perfect for smoothie bowls, shakes, and desserts.

description: Compact native 1080p LED projector with 700 ANSI lumens, auto-keystone correction, built-in speaker, and 3-hour battery. Projects up to 120 inches.

description: Professional-grade 1500W blender with a high-torque motor, 6-blade stainless steel assembly, and a 2L BPA-free jar. Crushes ice and frozen fruits in seconds.

description: Crispy roasted Korean seaweed sheets seasoned with sesame oil and sea salt. 10-pack multipack, low-calorie, rich in iodine and omega-3s.

description: Classic crew neck sweater crafted from 100% extra-fine merino wool. Naturally temperature-regulating, lightweight, and machine washable.

description: Sporty-chic mini pleated skirt with a high waist, built-in shorts, and lightweight stretch fabric. Perfect for tennis, golf, or everyday casual wear.

name: Zinc + Quercetin Immune Support
description: Synergistic zinc picolinate and quercetin formula to support immune defense, reduce inflammation, and enhance cellular health. Vegan capsules.

description: Scandinavian-style wall clock made from solid oak with a silent quartz movement and minimalist dial. 30cm diameter, battery operated.

description: Waterproof mid-cut hiking boots with a Gore-Tex membrane, Vibram outsole for superior grip, and a removable OrthoLite insole. Ideal for multi-day trails.

description: Cold-pressed juice blend of kale, spinach, cucumber, ginger, lemon, and green apple. No added sugar, HPP-preserved for up to 30-day shelf life.

description: Professional tourmaline ceramic hair straightener with 230°C max temperature, floating plates for snag-free straightening, and auto shut-off after 60 minutes.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Fully adjustable ergonomic office chair with lumbar support, 4D armrests, breathable mesh back, and a class 4 gas lift. Rated for 8+ hours of daily use.

name: Classic Oxford Derby Shoes
description: Handcrafted full-grain leather Oxford Derby shoes with Goodyear welt construction, leather sole, and cushioned insole. A timeless choice for formal occasions.

name: Aloe Vera Gel Pure 99%
description: Pure 99% organic aloe vera gel suitable for sunburn relief, skin hydration, after-sun care, and hair frizz control. Colorant-free, fragrance-free.

description: Ultra HD 4K video doorbell with two-way audio, package detection, color night vision, and local storage. Compatible with Alexa and Google Assistant.

name: Raw Apple Cider Vinegar with Mother
description: Unfiltered, unrefined raw apple cider vinegar containing the beneficial mother culture. Unpasteurized and made from organic heirloom apples.

name: Pilates Reformer Machine Foldable
description: Foldable home Pilates reformer with 4 resistance springs, adjustable footbar, non-slip carriage, and aluminum anodized frame. Supports up to 140kg.

name: Silk Slip Midi Dress
description: Luxurious 100% mulberry silk slip midi dress with adjustable spaghetti straps, side split, and a fluid bias-cut silhouette. A wardrobe investment piece.

description: 7-inch paperwhite e-ink display with adjustable warm light, 32GB storage for 24,000 books, 10-week battery life, and IPX8 waterproofing.

name: Free-Range Organic Eggs (12pk)

name: Cork Yoga Blocks Set of 2
description: Pair of naturally antimicrobial cork yoga blocks in standard 23x15x10cm size. Sturdy enough to support 200kg, smooth edges, and sustainably sourced.

description: Elegant arched full-length standing mirror with a thin metal frame and a lean-against-wall design. Adds light and depth to any bedroom or entryway.

name: Turmeric & Black Pepper Capsules
description: High-potency turmeric extract (95% curcuminoids) combined with BioPerine black pepper for enhanced bioavailability. Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant support.

name: Double-Breasted Wool Blend Coat
description: Elegant double-breasted wool-blend coat with a belted waist, wide lapels, and a fully lined interior. A winter wardrobe essential that pairs with everything.

name: Drawing Tablet 10 inch
description: Professional 10-inch pen tablet with 8192 levels of pressure sensitivity, tilt support, and battery-free stylus. Compatible with all major creative software.

name: Smart Instant Pot 6QT
description: 7-in-1 electric pressure cooker: pressure cook, slow cook, rice, yogurt, sauté, steam, and warm. Wi-Fi enabled with app control, 6QT capacity.

name: Intensive Hand Cream SPF15
description: Deeply nourishing hand cream with shea butter, glycerin, and vitamin E for intense moisture. Lightweight, fast-absorbing formula with SPF15 UV protection.

name: Single Origin Espresso Beans 250g
description: Single origin espresso roast beans from a single farm in Yirgacheffe, Ethiopia. Notes of blueberry, dark chocolate, and jasmine with a honey-sweet finish.

name: Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle 1L
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated 1L water bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12 hours. Leak-proof, dishwasher-safe lid and powder-coated finish.

name: Slim Leather Watch
description: Minimalist slim Japanese quartz watch with sapphire crystal glass, genuine leather strap, and a case thickness of just 7.5mm. Water resistant to 50m.

name: AHA/BHA Exfoliating Toner
description: Gentle chemical exfoliating toner with 5% glycolic acid (AHA) and 2% salicylic acid (BHA). Unclogs pores, smooths texture, and improves skin clarity with regular use.

description: Whisper-quiet ultrasonic aromatherapy diffuser with 500ml capacity, 7-color LED mood lighting, auto shut-off, and up to 10-hour continuous mist.

name: Organic Pea Protein Powder Vanilla
description: Clean organic pea protein isolate with 25g of protein per serving. No artificial sweeteners, vegan, gluten-free, and sweetened only with stevia and vanilla extract.

name: Wireless Charging Pad Trio
description: 3-in-1 wireless charging pad for phone (15W), earbuds (5W), and smartwatch simultaneously. Slim profile, LED indicator, and foreign object detection.

name: Wireless Push-Up T-Shirt Bra
description: Seamless wireless push-up bra with removable padding, microfiber fabric, and light compression support. Invisible under T-shirts and tops.

name: Smart LED Bulbs RGB Starter Kit
description: Starter kit of 4 smart E27 LED bulbs with 16 million colors, adjustable warmth, scenes, routines, and voice control via Alexa/Google. No hub required.

description: Calming bedtime herbal tea blend with valerian root, chamomile, passionflower, and lemon balm. Caffeine-free, organic, and naturally sweetened with stevia.

name: Foam Roller Deep Tissue 45cm
description: High-density EPP foam roller with a multi-zone textured surface for deep tissue massage, myofascial release, and muscle recovery post-workout.

name: Baby Spinach & Arugula Blend
description: Freshly harvested organic baby spinach and arugula blend, triple-washed and ready to eat. Packed with iron, folate, and vitamins A, C, and K.

name: Cedar & Sandalwood Solid Perfume
description: Alcohol-free solid perfume in a sleek compact. Blended with cedarwood, sandalwood, and a hint of amber. TSA-friendly and ideal for on-the-go touch-ups.

name: Solid Wood Standing Desk
description: Electric height-adjustable solid wood standing desk with programmable memory settings (4 presets), anti-collision sensor, and a whisper-quiet dual motor system.

name: Flannel Plaid Pajama Set
description: Super soft 100% cotton flannel pajama set with a button-up top and elastic waist pants. Cozy, breathable, and perfect for cold nights.

name: FlyBot Drone 4K GPS
description: Compact GPS drone with a 4K stabilized camera, 30-minute flight time, intelligent return-to-home, obstacle avoidance, and a 3-axis mechanical gimbal.
